name: Expansion Signal Detector
description: Identifies accounts showing expansion readiness based on usage patterns, feature adoption, and engagement spikes.
longDescription: Monitors customer accounts for signals that indicate expansion readiness — usage exceeding current plan limits, new department adoption, feature requests for higher-tier features, and positive sentiment trends. Scores each account's expansion potential and alerts the CSM and AE with a briefing on the opportunity including suggested upsell/cross-sell plays.
